pillars.label: Architecture Fitness
pillars.detail: No cycle or coupling ratchet baseline has been established yet.
pillars.remediation: Run `/code-map` (or `/brownfield`), then `npm run cycles && npm run coupling-gate`, to establish the architecture ratchets.

pillars.label: Testing
pillars.detail: Coverage ratchet: yes; mutation gate: yes; regression gates: yes. No acceptance-test artifacts yet under specs/test_artefacts/acceptance/ (G20 not yet adopted â€” informational, doesn't affect this pillar's status).

pillars.label: Code Quality / Modularity Freshness
pillars.detail: No code-graph.json yet â€” modularity staleness cannot be computed.
pillars.remediation: Run `/brownfield` (or `/code-map`) to produce a code-graph, then a modularity review to establish a baseline.

pillars.label: Documentation / Navigation
pillars.remediation: Run `/brownfield` (or `/code-map`) to generate the living navigation, kept fresh by graph-refresh.js.

pillars.label: Observability
pillars.detail: observability.enabled is false â€” the RED-metrics baseline is explicitly opted out.
pillars.remediation: Set project-manifest.json#observability.enabled:true if this project has a backend to instrument.

pillars.label: Security & Governance
pillars.detail: Baseline secrets scan always active. Enhanced tools â€” semgrep: yes, gitleaks: no, dep-audit: yes.
pillars.remediation: Install the missing enhanced tool(s) (semgrep, gitleaks, and/or npm/pip audit) so `/gate` can run the full computational security tier.
